scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 04 Tactics mobile drag UX: dnd-kit sensor thresholds, body scroll lock utility, drag cancel cleanup, touch-action contracts, glass drag overlay, and reduced-motion-safe drop bounce feedback.

targetedTest.summary: 71 tests passed, including nested body scroll lock restoration and TacticsDragBuilder pitch/bench touch-action class contracts.

lint.summary: ESLint passed as part of baseline verification.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed for scrollLock, TacticsDragBuilder dnd lifecycle changes, SoccerPitch props, CSS class usage, and UI test changes.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 231 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

retrospective.issuesObserved: Direct body style writes would conflict with modal locks, so scroll blocking was routed through a small reference-counted utility and released on drag end, cancel, and unmount.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual iOS Safari and Android Chrome drag testing was not run in this environment; deterministic tests cover scroll lock nesting and visible touch-action contracts.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider a focused dnd-kit interaction fixture that can simulate drag start/cancel and assert body scroll state without relying on full ScheduleTab setup.
retrospective.reason: The mobile drag behavior is section-specific interaction work and does not require a durable harness rule promotion.
